## Multi-language impact

<!--
Tesla Carview is multilingual. If this feature adds user-visible text,
note that all six locales (de/en/fr/es/tr/el) need to be filled.
The in-app handbook and the bilingual repo docs follow the same rule.
-->

- [ ] Adds new UI strings → all six locale files need entries
- [ ] Touches the in-app handbook → all six handbook markdowns need updates
- [ ] Affects repo documentation → `*.md` and `*.en.md` need to stay in sync

## Additional context

<!-- Links, references, related issues, mockups, anything that helps. -->
